title: FGA Pro Max — Token Set
description: Schema for token JSON files (canonical + seeds + playwright-cached extractions). A token set is a complete refero-style design system: colors with semantic names, display + body typography, spacing rhythm, radii, and anti-patterns documenting banned uses.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file (relative or absolute). Optional but recommended.

id.description: Slug identifier — must match the filename without .json extension.

description.description: 1–3 sentence summary of the style's character and intended use.

source.description: URL the system was extracted from, or 'manual-seed' for hand-authored token sets.

extractedAt.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the token set was captured.

extractionMethod.description: How the token values were obtained. manual-seed = hand-authored from scratch (e.g. FGA canonical). manual-curated = hand-extracted by observation. playwright-scrape = output of scripts/extract-tokens.mjs. refero-extract = pulled from refero.design or equivalent tooling.

colors.description: Semantic colors. Keys MUST follow --color-<adjective>-<noun> naming. At least 5 entries required.

value.description: Hex color, rgb(...), or 'TBD-verify' if unverified.

role.description: Semantic intent — what this color is FOR.

context.description: 1-line plain-English description of the color's character.

typography.description: Font families. Must include at least one display and one body font (by --font-display-* and --font-body-* keys).

role.description: What this font is used for (e.g. 'hero headlines', 'body copy').

sizes.description: Plain-English size guidance — e.g. 'up to 300px' or '12px / 14px / 16px'.

spacing.description: Spacing scale. At least 3 entries required. Values are CSS-ready strings (clamp(), px, rem).

radii.description: Border-radius scale. At least 3 entries required.

antiPatterns.description: Banned uses of these tokens for THIS style — guardrails the design layer enforces. At least 2 entries required.

_unverified.description: Optional list of token keys whose values are best-effort and need manual verification. Token-extractor scripts may populate this list.
